name: Bipolar Disorder - Diagnosis Code Query
description: Tests ability to find bipolar disorder patients via diagnosis code. First mood-stabilizer phenotype.
prompt: Find all patients with a diagnosis of bipolar disorder.

prompts.broad: Find patients diagnosed with bipolar disorder — characterized by alternating manic and depressive episodes.
prompts.expert: Search Condition resources with SNOMED 13746004 (Bipolar disorder). Query: Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|13746004
